name: fiftyone-dataset-import
description: Universal dataset import for FiftyOne supporting all media types (images, videos, point clouds, 3D scenes), all label formats (COCO, YOLO, VOC, CVAT, KITTI, etc.), and multimodal grouped datasets. Use when users want to import any dataset regardless of format, automatically detect folder structure, handle autonomous driving data with multiple cameras and LiDAR, or create grouped datasets from multimodal data. Requires FiftyOne MCP server.
capabilities: Auto-detect media types including images, videos, point clouds, and 3D scenes
Recognize label formats such as COCO, YOLO, VOC, CVAT, KITTI, and OpenLABEL
Identify multimodal grouping patterns for multi-sensor data
Convert proprietary point cloud formats to PCD for visualization
Install required devkit packages for specialized formats
Validate imported sample counts against source files
author: AdonaiVera
securitySummary: This skill contains only a SKILL.md documentation file with instructions for AI assistants. All 295 static findings are false positives: markdown code blocks triggered 'backtick execution' patterns, documentation URLs triggered 'hardcoded URL' patterns, and example shell commands triggered 'system reconnaissance' patterns. No executable code exists. The skill guides dataset import workflows with proper user confirmation requirements.
valueStatement: Dataset import often requires manual format detection and configuration. This skill auto-detects media types, label formats, and sensor groupings to create properly structured FiftyOne datasets.
userTitle: Import any dataset format into FiftyOne automatically
limitations: Requires FiftyOne MCP server and voxel51 plugins installed
Proprietary formats need their devkit packages installed separately
Point cloud conversion requires open3d package
Very large datasets over 100K samples benefit from batch processing

useCases.title: Import labeled training datasets
useCases.description: Load COCO, YOLO, or VOC annotated datasets for model training and evaluation with automatic format detection.

useCases.title: Load multi-sensor scene data
useCases.description: Import nuScenes, PandaSet, or KITTI datasets with synchronized cameras, LiDAR, and radar as grouped scenes.

useCases.title: Process 3D point cloud data
useCases.description: Convert LiDAR data from binary or pickle formats to PCD for 3D visualization and cuboid label analysis.

promptTemplates.title: Basic dataset import
promptTemplates.prompt: Scan and import the dataset at /path/to/data into FiftyOne. Detect the format automatically.

promptTemplates.title: COCO with annotations
promptTemplates.prompt: Import images from /data/images with COCO labels from /data/annotations.json as my-coco-dataset.

promptTemplates.title: Autonomous driving data
promptTemplates.prompt: Import the nuScenes dataset at /data/nuscenes with all cameras and LiDAR as a grouped dataset.

promptTemplates.title: Point cloud conversion
promptTemplates.prompt: Convert LiDAR files from .pkl.gz to .pcd format and import with 3D cuboid labels into FiftyOne.

bestPractices: Always scan the directory structure before importing to detect formats and grouping patterns
Confirm the detected configuration with the user before creating datasets
Validate that imported sample counts match source file counts after import
antiPatterns: Skipping folder scan and assuming format without verification
Overwriting existing datasets without checking and asking permission
Importing grouped multi-sensor data as flat dataset losing relationships

faq.question: What dataset formats are supported?
faq.answer: Images, videos, point clouds, 3D scenes. Labels: COCO, YOLO, VOC, CVAT, KITTI, OpenLABEL, TFRecords, and classification trees.

faq.question: How large can datasets be?
faq.answer: FiftyOne handles datasets of any size. For 100K+ samples, use batch processing and delegated execution for better performance.

faq.question: What autonomous driving formats work?
faq.answer: nuScenes, PandaSet, KITTI, Waymo Open, Argoverse, and Lyft L5 with their respective devkit packages.

faq.question: Is my data sent anywhere?
faq.answer: No. Data stays local. The skill only reads files and creates FiftyOne dataset references on your machine.

faq.question: How do I import point clouds?
faq.answer: PCD and PLY files import directly. Other formats like PKL or BIN are converted to PCD using open3d.

faq.question: What are grouped datasets?
faq.answer: Groups link related samples like multi-camera frames and LiDAR from the same timestamp for synchronized viewing.
